tracks.meaning: the main story or sequence of events in a play, film, book, or other narrative work
a piece of land, typically a defined area marked out for a specific purpose
to produce a graph or diagram by marking points on a coordinate system
a secret plan or conspiracy to carry out a harmful or illegal act
